solutions.solution: The pattern in clockwise direction is 1 + 2 = 3, 2 + 3 = 5, 3 + 5 = 8, 5 + 8 = 13. Hence, ? = 13
As, 13 + 5 = 6 over 3 and 34 + 8 = 14 over 3. Similarly, missing number = 8 + 7 over 3 = 5. Hence, option (c) is the correct answer.

Numbers placed along the sides of the triangle are the squares of the numbers at the centre of the triangle, as shown below: (4)² = 16, (3)² = 9, (9)² = 81. Similarly, √64 = 8, √100 = 10, √49 = 7. So, the missing number = 8107. Hence, option (c) is the correct answer

As, {(5)² + (4)²} – {(3)² + (2)²} = (25 + 16) – (9 + 4) = 41 – 13 = 28. Similarly, {(8)² + (4)²} – {(8)² + (?)²} = 12 ⇒ (64 + 16) – (64 + (?)²) = 12 ⇒ ?² = 4. So, the missing number = 2. Hence, option (d) is the correct answer.
